# Md5Key.Prefix method

The first *n* bytes of the key, packed into a UInt64 high-order-first. CASC local indices key on a 9-byte EKey prefix; this gives a fast, allocation-free bucket value.

```csharp
public ulong Prefix(int n)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| n | Prefix length in bytes (1..9). |
